name: Shrek
description: The beloved DreamWorks ogre — Shrek, Fiona, Donkey, and the kingdom of Far Far Away.

questions.q: What kind of creature is Shrek?

source.notes: A big green swamp-dwelling ogre.

questions.q: Who voices Shrek in the DreamWorks animated films?

source.notes: Myers brought the Scottish accent to the role.

questions.q: What is the name of Shrek's fast-talking sidekick?

source.notes: Voiced by Eddie Murphy.

questions.q: What is the name of Shrek's love interest, the princess he rescues?

source.notes: Voiced by Cameron Diaz.

questions.q: What magical event transforms Princess Fiona every night before Shrek breaks her curse?

source.notes: Cursed to take ogre form at night.

questions.q: Who is the short villain of the original 2001 Shrek film, obsessed with becoming king?

source.original_a: He was swallowed up by a dragon
source.notes: Lord Farquaad — voiced by John Lithgow.

questions.q: Which animation studio produced the Shrek franchise?

source.notes: DreamWorks Animation.

questions.q: In Shrek 2, which sword-fighting orange tabby is hired to assassinate Shrek?

source.notes: Voiced by Antonio Banderas.

questions.q: What is the name of the kingdom visited in Shrek 2, ruled by Fiona's parents?

source.notes: Styled after Hollywood Boulevard.

questions.q: Which song memorably opens the original Shrek film?

source.notes: Smash Mouth's 'All Star' — now an internet meme.

questions.q: The original 2001 Shrek won the first-ever Academy Award in which category?

source.notes: First winner when the category was created in 2001.

questions.q: What color is Princess Fiona's hair?

source.notes: Red hair; Fiona is a redhead in both human and ogre form.

questions.q: In the original film, how does Shrek evict the fairy-tale creatures from his swamp?
choices: He chases them away with fire
He rescues the princess to win their removal
He lets Lord Farquaad move them all elsewhere initially

source.notes: Farquaad offers to relocate them if Shrek retrieves Fiona from the dragon's castle.

questions.q: In the Shrek films, what color is Donkey?

source.notes: Grey with a white face.

questions.q: How many mainline Shrek films have DreamWorks released through 2024?

source.notes: Shrek (2001), 2, the Third, Forever After — four mainline, plus two Puss in Boots films and specials.

questions.q: The 2007 film Shrek the Third reveals that Prince Arthur ('Artie') — Shrek's chosen heir — is a descendant of which British legend?

source.notes: Justin Timberlake voiced Artie.

questions.q: The 2010 fourth film, Shrek Forever After, features which devious character trying to undo Shrek's existence?

source.notes: Voiced by Walt Dohrn.

questions.q: The Shrek musical opened on Broadway in 2008. Which comedy actress played Princess Fiona?

source.notes: Brian d'Arcy James played Shrek.

questions.q: Which song plays over Shrek and Fiona's tender emotional montage at the end of Shrek 2?

source.notes: John Cale's version of Leonard Cohen's 'Hallelujah.'

questions.q: Who voices the Fairy Godmother in Shrek 2?

source.notes: Saunders of Absolutely Fabulous.

questions.q: Who voices Fiona's father, King Harold, in Shrek 2 and beyond?

source.notes: Andrews voices Queen Lillian; Cleese voices King Harold.

questions.q: DreamWorks announced a fifth Shrek film for which year, returning the original cast?

source.notes: Announced in 2024 for a December 23, 2026 release.
